description:
Parent epic: V3 E1: Simplified DSL foundation

Source task 4/13 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Decide final nouns for agent, context, result, actions, controls, memory,
  compaction, schedules, workflows, subagents, handoffs, and imports.

Epic closure criteria:
- the simplified DSL is the only documented DSL
- pre-V3 DSL shapes are removed
- DSL tests cover success, failure, and error-message quality

comments.text: Settled the V3 code-facing nouns for this slice: agent/context/action/result are now reflected in the DSL. Added result schema syntax that maps to the existing structured-output runtime, generated result/result_schema helpers, and preserved internal output keys for runtime continuity. Verification: mix format --check-formatted, mix compile --warnings-as-errors, focused DSL/output tests, mix test.
